title: feat: remove template task board surface and task CRUD
motivation: The board-first shell and generic task CRUD are template artifacts outside the PRD product model, and they keep non-PRD entities active in runtime and tests.

in: Remove board navigation state and template board header affordances.
Remove TaskListView integration and generic task CRUD API wiring.
Update tests/docs that currently assume board-first UX.
out: Changes to PRD wiki/campaign/compliance domain workflows.
Refactors unrelated to template board removal.

acceptance_criteria: No board view or template project header appears in the main app shell.
`/api/tasks` endpoints are removed or return not-found because handler wiring is deleted.
Wiki/campaign/admin/settings PRD surfaces remain reachable and working.
test_plan: Run web and server test suites that cover shell navigation and API routing; verify no regression in PRD surfaces.
Attempt GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE on `/api/tasks` and verify route removal behavior.
Smoke-test login -> wiki view -> campaign view -> settings flow in browser.
